text-1: In consideration of the possibility of Bitcoin being split into two separate assets based on the decision made by the majority of Bitcoin miners on August 1, 2017, we would like to warn you about the possibility of dangerously heightened volatility with this event.
text-2: Here at IQ Option we take it as our mission to provide you with a smooth trading experience. However, there are circumstances out of our reach and should the split be initiated, we may be forced to suspend Cryptocurrency trading altogether until the configuration of the Bitcoin is finalized. Please, make sure you use discretion when investing in cryptocurrencies during this turbulent time, as proper risk-management is your personal responsibility.
